title: ecbolium ovatum
intro: Ecbolium ovatum, also known as the Indian spinach or creeping eclipta, is a type of flowering plant in the mint family, Lamiaceae. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving liver function, and supporting the immune system. Ecbolium ovatum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
